instructions: 2. Click 'Download Full Dataset' for the most recent year
4. Place the filtered CSV in data/real/cms_aba_providers.csv
5. Re-run this script to process the data
metadata.notes: This dataset contains actual Medicare claims data aggregated by NPI and HCPCS code. Most ABA therapy is Medicaid-funded, so this represents only the Medicare subset.

aba_hcpcs_codes.97153: Adaptive behavior treatment by protocol (most common)
aba_hcpcs_codes.97154: Group adaptive behavior treatment by protocol
aba_hcpcs_codes.97155: Adaptive behavior treatment with protocol modification
